storyHook: 热身锻炼，比赛或跑步，放松聊天

narrative.when: 周六下午四点，约好的足球比赛时间
narrative.how: 热身后开始比赛，中场休息聊几句
narrative.method: 热身拉伸、开始比赛、跑步传球、赛后放松聊战况
narrative.event: 甲这周练习不够，担心比赛中体力跟不上

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let's get started with some stretching.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have not run much this week.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, you will be all right after a warm-up.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I hope so. My legs are a bit tired.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do some leg stretches. That will help.
turns.zh: 做几个腿部拉伸。会有帮助的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. I will do some more.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The grass smells good today.
turns.zh: 今天的草地闻起来不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it is a good day for a match.
turns.zh: 是啊，是个适合比赛的好天气。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Are you ready for the match?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Almost. Give me one more minute.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let us get to the middle.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am with you. Keep it going.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do not go too hard at first.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite right. I will keep it slow.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. We have got this.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The whistle is gone. Let us start.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take the ball first.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I am here for a short time.
turns.zh: 好的。我在这儿待一小会儿。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That was a good send. Well done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. But they are pushing hard now.
turns.zh: 谢了。但他们现在逼得很紧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Keep your head up. I will come to help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My legs are tired.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take a breath. Do not force it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: They are coming again. Watch the left side.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see him. I will cover you.
turns.zh: 我看见他了。我来掩护你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good cover. You are slow today.
turns.zh: 补得不错。你今天有点慢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see. I did not run much this week.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. We will keep them back.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am almost out of air.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep moving. Do not stop.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will keep my place.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here they come. Get ready.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am on him. Go for the ball.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I have it. Give it here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well done. That was a good play.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You did well to get that ball.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. I am still very tired.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We only have ten more minutes.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will give it all I have.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the way. Come on!

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am going to get the ball back.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Be quick. They are coming again.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see him. I will go for it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I am here if you need me.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have it. Give it here.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here you go. Keep it safe.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Now let us go forward.
turns.zh: 我会的。现在我们往前压。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I am with you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am tired but I will keep going.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the way. Almost done.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am out of breath.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take a rest. We have time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My legs are like stone.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is from not running this week.
turns.zh: 那是这周没跑步的结果。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see. I will do better.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now get up and go again.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. One more push.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am with you. Let us get to the end.
turns.zh: 我陪你。我们一起走到最后。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We did it. Not bad for a tired man.
turns.zh: 我们做到了。对一个累坏的人来说还不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quite right. You gave all you had.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I need water. My mouth is dry.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here. Take your time.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That was a hard run.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You did well to get the ball.
turns.zh: 你能拿到球已经很不错了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I almost got a hard knot in my leg.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep moving. Do not let it get stiff.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do some stretches.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. I will join you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My leg muscles are tight.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is normal. Stretch them out.
turns.zh: 正常。把它们拉开就好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I need more training before the play after this one.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We can run together after school.
turns.zh: 放学后我们可以一起跑。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That would be good. I am slow now.
turns.zh: 那太好了。我现在跑得慢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You were not slow. You kept up well.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: But I had no power at the end.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is because you did not do enough runs.
turns.zh: 那是因为你跑得不够多。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. I will do three runs a week.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Start with two. Do not push too hard.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is right. I will okay on the first day of the week.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Same time, same place.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let us get on with the second part.
turns.zh: 好了，我们继续下半部分吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I am ready. Let us go.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Keep the ball on our side for a time.
turns.zh: 球先控在我们这边一会儿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will have a go. My legs are slow.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Just give it short. No need for long runs.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Here they come.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have the ball. Who is free?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am here. Give it to me.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good move. Now go up.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am with you. Let us get one in.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That was a good play. Well done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am tired. My legs are like stone.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us do some stretching. It will help.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I need to get my breath back.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You did well in the second part.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I almost gave up. But you kept me going.
turns.zh: 我差点放弃，但你让我坚持下来了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We will do more training after this week.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I will come every day if I can.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is right. Let us go back now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I am ready for a cold drink.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A cold drink sounds great. There is a store near the door.
turns.zh: 来杯凉的挺好。门口附近有家店。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get a bottle of water. Would you like one too?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A: Yes, please. My throat is dry.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We did well to keep them from getting a point.
turns.zh: 我们没让对方得分，干得不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That last stop was great. You kept us in the play.
turns.zh: 最后那次扑救太棒了，你让我们没输。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I was in good chance. The ball came right at me.
turns.zh: 我运气好，球直接朝我来了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, it was a trick of the trade. You have a good eye.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. We work well together.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. We will get a good one after this.
turns.zh: 对。我们之后会赢一场好的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let us get that drink now.
turns.zh: 好的。我们现在去喝东西吧。

storyBlurb: 周六下午，甲和乙在操场热身，准备足球比赛。甲因训练不足，担心体力不支，却在比赛中拼尽全力。
storyScript:
【开场·到运动场】周六下午四点，阳光斜照在操场上，甲和乙已经换好球衣，站在草坪边。甲弯下腰，双手触碰脚尖，拉伸大腿后侧，心里却有些发虚。这周他因为作业多，只跑了一次步，体能储备明显不足。乙在他旁边压腿，随口问：你最近练得怎么样？甲含糊地应了一声，继续做弓步压腿，试图用热身动作掩盖内心的不安。草皮散发着泥土和青草的气息，远处球门框在阳光下泛着白光，像是等着他们去征服，又像在无声地考验。

【进行·开始锻炼】裁判哨响，比赛开始。甲踢中场，负责接应和传球。前十分钟，他还能跟上节奏，几次短传都准确找到队友。但很快，对手开始高位逼抢，甲接球后刚转身，对方后卫就贴了上来。他仓促出脚，球被断下，对手顺势打反击。乙在边路喊：别急，慢慢来！甲喘着粗气点头，汗水顺着脸颊滴落。他咬牙回追，但双腿像灌了铅，每一步都沉重。半场结束前，乙从后场长传，甲奋力前插，在禁区边缘勉强触到球，却因体力不支，射门绵软无力，被门将没收。他双手撑膝，大口呼吸，胸口像被压了块石头。

【进行·开始锻炼】中场休息，两人坐在场边喝水。乙递过毛巾：你刚才那个跑位不错，就是最后没劲了。甲苦笑：这周没怎么练，腿都软了。乙拍拍他肩膀：没事，下半场你多跑动，不用急着进攻，先稳住防守。甲点头，心里却知道，自己连防守都吃力。下半场开始，甲刻意减少冲刺，用站位和预判来弥补体能。一次防守中，对手突破中场，甲卡住内线，用身体挡住对方去路，虽然被撞得踉跄，但成功延缓了进攻。乙趁机回防，将球解围。甲感到小腿肌肉紧绷，几乎要抽筋，但他咬牙坚持，直到终场哨响。比赛以平局告终，但甲觉得自己像打了一场胜仗。

【收束·放松回家】赛后，两人在跑道边做拉伸。甲坐在地上，双腿分开，俯身向前，感受大腿内侧的酸胀。乙在旁边帮他压背：你今天后面踢得不错，硬撑下来了。甲说：差点抽筋，还好没丢人。夕阳把他们的影子拉得很长，操场上的人渐渐散去。乙提议：下周一起加练体能？甲笑着答应：好，我可不想再这么狼狈了。他们收拾好装备，并肩走出校门，晚风拂过汗湿的球衣，带着一丝凉意。甲回头看了一眼操场，心里默默盘算着明天的训练计划。
